commands:
sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('UN Observers Arrive Ahead of Historic By-Elections','un-observers-by-elections','

A 42-member UN observer delegation has arrived to monitor by-elections across Punjab, Sindh, and KPK — the most closely watched polls in recent history.

','UN observers arrive for by-election monitoring in Pakistan.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529107386315-e1a2ed48a620?w=1200&q=80','GEN Correspondent','Elections','published','2026-04-29 11:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Digital Voting Pilots Show 40% Higher Turnout','digital-voting-pilots-higher-turnout','

Pakistan first large-scale digital voting pilot recorded a 40% surge in urban turnout with 4-second biometric verification times.

','Digital voting pilots show 40% higher turnout in urban constituencies.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540910419892-4a36d2c3266c?w=1200&q=80','Sarah Khan','Technology','published','2026-04-29 08:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Supreme Court Rules on Constituency Boundary Redraw','supreme-court-constituency-boundaries','

The Supreme Court ordered a full delimitation of all 342 National Assembly constituencies before the next general election, citing outdated 1998 census data.

','Supreme Court orders full constituency delimitation before next general election.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1589829545856-d10d557cf95f?w=1200&q=80','Imran Baig','Elections','published','2026-04-29 05:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Government Meeting on Electoral Reforms Concludes in Islamabad','govt-meeting-electoral-reforms-2026','

Senior ministers and ECP officials concluded a two-day government meeting on electoral reforms including biometric verification rollout and media access protocols for the upcoming by-elections.

','Two-day government meeting on electoral reforms concludes with key resolutions on digital voting and observer access.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521791136064-7986c2920216?w=1200&q=80','GEN Editorial Board','Government Meeting','published','2026-04-28 14:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Youth Voter Registration Surges 34% via Digital Campaign','youth-voter-registration-surge','

A 90-day digital campaign registered 2.3 million first-time voters aged 18-25, with female registrations reaching 51% for the first time in Pakistan electoral history.

','Youth voter registration surges 34% as digital campaign drives civic engagement across Pakistan.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529156069898-49953e39b3ac?w=1200&q=80','Zainab Hussain','Analysis','published','2026-04-28 10:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Biometric Verification Deployed at 3400 Polling Stations','biometric-verification-3400-stations','

The ECP deployed biometric fingerprint verification to 3,400 polling stations — the largest technology rollout in Pakistan electoral history, with 4-second verification times and 99.97% accuracy.

','New biometric verification system deployed across 3400 polling stations nationwide.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1563013544-824ae1b704d3?w=1200&q=80','Ali Hassan','Technology','published','2026-04-27 09:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('How Pakistan Election Monitoring Compares Internationally','pakistan-monitoring-international-standards','

A comparative analysis benchmarks Pakistan electoral monitoring against global standards set by the Carter Center, OSCE, and UNDP — identifying significant progress and persistent gaps.

','Pakistan election monitoring compared against international standards — progress made, gaps remain.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521791136064-7986c2920216?w=1200&q=80','Dr. Ayesha Raza','International','published','2026-04-26 12:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('GEN Issues Press Freedom Alert After Journalists Barred','gen-press-freedom-alert-2026','

GEN issued a formal Press Freedom Alert after accredited journalists were prevented from entering polling areas in three constituencies during last week by-elections.

','GEN issues Press Freedom Alert after journalists blocked from three polling stations.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504711434969-e33886168f5c?w=1200&q=80','GEN Editorial Board','Press','published','2026-04-25 08:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('Annual Government Meeting on Election Security Protocols','annual-govt-meeting-security-2025','

The annual government security coordination meeting reviewed election day protocols and inter-agency communication plans. Key decisions included deploying rapid response teams to 15 sensitive constituencies.

','Annual government meeting reviews election security protocols and inter-agency coordination for 2025.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523050854058-8df90110c9f1?w=1200&q=80','GEN Staff','Government Meeting','published','2025-03-15 10:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) VALUES ('2024 General Election: Full Results Analysis','general-election-results-analysis-2024','

A comprehensive post-election analysis examining turnout trends, party performance, regional patterns, and the accuracy of pre-election polling across all four provinces.

','Full analysis of 2024 general election results including turnout trends and party performance across all provinces.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551836022-deb4988cc6c0?w=1200&q=80','Prof. Khalid Mehmood','Analysis','published','2024-02-20 09:00:00') ON CONFLICT (slug) DO NOTHING" 2>&1

sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_posts, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT category, ', ' ORDER BY category) as categories, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM published_at)::text, ', ' ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM published_at)::text) as years FROM posts" 2>&1
